targets.queryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', period_end_date || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN mv_delta END) AS W_MVDelta, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN mv_delta END) AS M_MVDelta, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN mv_delta END) AS Q_MVDelta, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN mv_delta END) AS Y_MVDelta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_end_date ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', period_end_date || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN mv_delta END) AS W_MVDelta, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN mv_delta END) AS M_MVDelta, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN mv_delta END) AS Q_MVDelta, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN mv_delta END) AS Y_MVDelta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_end_date ORDER BY period_end_date

targets.queryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', period_end_date || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN twr_period_pct END) AS W_TWR, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN twr_period_pct END) AS M_TWR, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN twr_period_pct END) AS Q_TWR, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN twr_period_pct END) AS Y_TWR FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_end_date ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', period_end_date || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN twr_period_pct END) AS W_TWR, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN twr_period_pct END) AS M_TWR, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN twr_period_pct END) AS Q_TWR, MAX(CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN twr_period_pct END) AS Y_TWR FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_end_date ORDER BY period_end_date

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) SELECT ps.period_type AS PType, (ps.period_start_date || '..' || ps.period_end_date) AS Range, round(ps.mv_delta,2) AS MVDelta, round(ps.twr_period_pct,2) AS TWR FROM period_summary ps JOIN latest l ON l.period_type=ps.period_type AND l.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date ORDER BY CASE ps.period_type WHEN 'WEEK' THEN 1 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN 2 WHEN 'QUARTER' THEN 3 WHEN 'YEAR' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) SELECT ps.period_type AS PType, (ps.period_start_date || '..' || ps.period_end_date) AS Range, round(ps.mv_delta,2) AS MVDelta, round(ps.twr_period_pct,2) AS TWR FROM period_summary ps JOIN latest l ON l.period_type=ps.period_type AND l.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date ORDER BY CASE ps.period_type WHEN 'WEEK' THEN 1 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN 2 WHEN 'QUARTER' THEN 3 WHEN 'YEAR' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) SELECT ps.period_type AS PType, round(ps.monthly_income_delta,2) AS IncDelta, round(ps.ltv_pct_delta,2) AS LTVDelta, round(ps.coverage_pct,1) AS CovPct FROM period_summary ps JOIN latest l ON l.period_type=ps.period_type AND l.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date ORDER BY CASE ps.period_type WHEN 'WEEK' THEN 1 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN 2 WHEN 'QUARTER' THEN 3 WHEN 'YEAR' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) SELECT ps.period_type AS PType, round(ps.monthly_income_delta,2) AS IncDelta, round(ps.ltv_pct_delta,2) AS LTVDelta, round(ps.coverage_pct,1) AS CovPct FROM period_summary ps JOIN latest l ON l.period_type=ps.period_type AND l.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date ORDER BY CASE ps.period_type WHEN 'WEEK' THEN 1 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN 2 WHEN 'QUARTER' THEN 3 WHEN 'YEAR' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5
